meaning: 1. to hold up (as an model); 2. to hold in esteem; 3. to revere; 4. to
sentence: 他一向崇尚简单自然的生活方式。
pinyin: Tā yīxiàng chóngshàng jiǎndān zìrán de shēnghuó fāngshì.
english: He has always advocated a simple and natural lifestyle.

meaning: 1. in former years; 2. in previous years
sentence: 今年的梅雨比往年来得早。
pinyin: Jīnnián de méiyǔ bǐ wǎngnián lái de zǎo.
english: This year's rainy season came earlier than in previous years.

sentence: 傍晚的海风吹来，感觉特别凉爽。
pinyin: Bàngwǎn de hǎifēng chuī lái, gǎnjué tèbié liángshuǎng.
english: The evening sea breeze blew in and felt wonderfully cool and refreshing.

sentence: 他患病期间，同事们都来探望他。
pinyin: Tā huànbìng qījiān, tóngshìmen dōu lái tànwàng tā.
english: While he was ill, his colleagues all came to visit him.

meaning: to storm a strategic pass; fig. to tackle a key problem
sentence: 团队正在攻关这个技术难题。
pinyin: Tuánduì zhèngzài gōngguān zhège jìshù nántí.
english: The team is working hard to tackle this technical challenge.
